proven.claim: Proven: at line 390, violations_length > 0 and v.smt2 was processed
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 390
; Proven: at line 390, violations_length > 0 and v.smt2 was processed
; (line 390 is inside the violations loop — same guard as line 376)
(declare-const violations_length Int)
(declare-const reached_390 Int)   ; 1 = execution reached line 390
; Code transition: line 390 is the last line inside the violations for-loop body
; Reaching it requires violations_length > 0 AND at least one iteration ran
(assert (=> (= reached_390 1) (> violations_length 0)))
; Negate: reached line 390 with empty violations array
(assert (= reached_390 1))
(assert (<= violations_length 0))
(check-sat)
